member.summary: Create a new instance of the PionexRestClient using provided options

member.summary: Create a new instance of the PionexRestClient using provided options

member.summary: Set the default options to be used when creating new clients

member.name: T:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexRestClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Pionex Rest API.

member.name: T:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexSocketClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Pionex websocket API

member.name: T:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexUserClientProvider
member.summary: Provider for clients with credentials for specific users

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexUserClientProvider.InitializeUserClient(System.String,Pionex.Net.PionexCredentials,Pionex.Net.PionexEnvironment)
member.summary: Initialize a client for the specified user identifier. This can be used so to initialize a client for a user so credentials do not need to be passed later.

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexUserClientProvider.ClearUserClients(System.String)
member.summary: Reset the cached clients for a user. This can be useful when a user changes API credentials.

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexUserClientProvider.GetRestClient(System.String,Pionex.Net.PionexCredentials,Pionex.Net.PionexEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Rest client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IPionexUserClientProvider.GetSocketClient(System.String,Pionex.Net.PionexCredentials,Pionex.Net.PionexEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Socket client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: P:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApi.ExchangeData
member.summary: Endpoints related to retrieving market and system data

member.name: T:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData
member.summary: Pionex Spot exchange data endpoints. Exchange data includes market data (tickers, order books, etc) and system status.

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetSymbolsAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Nullable{Pionex.Net.Enums.MarketType},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get trading pair information
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /api/v1/common/symbols

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetRecentTradesAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get recent trades
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /api/v1/market/trades

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetOrderBookAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get order book snapshot
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /api/v1/market/depth

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickersAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Pionex.Net.Enums.MarketType},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get 24-hour price change statistics
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /api/v1/market/tickers

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetBookTickersAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{Pionex.Net.Enums.MarketType},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get best bid/ask prices
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /api/v1/market/bookTickers

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IPionexSocketClientSpotApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Pionex.Net.Objects.Models.PionexTrade[]}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to trade updates
Docs:
Endpoint:
wss://ws.pionex.com/wsPub (topic: TRADE)
member.param: The event handler for the received data
Cancellation token for closing this subscription
member.returns: A stream subscription. This stream subscription can be used to be notified when the socket is disconnected/reconnected

member.name: P:Pionex.Net.Objects.PionexApiAddresses.RestClientSpotAddress
member.summary: The address used by the PionexRestClient for the Spot API

member.name: P:Pionex.Net.Objects.PionexApiAddresses.SocketClientSpotAddress
member.summary: The address used by the PionexSocketClient for the websocket Spot API

member.name: P:Pionex.Net.Objects.PionexApiAddresses.Default
member.summary: The default addresses to connect to the Pionex API

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.PionexCredentials.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing credentials in HMAC format

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.PionexCredentials.#ctor(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.HMACCredential)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing HMAC credentials

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.PionexEnvironment.#ctor
member.summary: ctor for DI, use for creating a custom environment

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.PionexEnvironment.GetEnvironmentByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the Pionex environment by name

member.name: M:Pionex.Net.PionexExchange.FormatSymbol(System.String,System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.TradingMode,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Format a base and quote asset to a Pionex recognized symbol

member.name: P:Pionex.Net.PionexExchange.RateLimiter
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Pionex API

member.name: T:Pionex.Net.PionexRateLimiters
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Pionex API

member.name: E:Pionex.Net.PionexRateLimiters.RateLimitTriggered
member.summary: Event for when a rate limit is triggered

member.name: E:Pionex.Net.PionexRateLimiters.RateLimitUpdated
member.summary: Event when the rate limit is updated. Note that it's only updated when a request is send, so there are no specific updates when the current usage is decaying.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPionex(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Add services such as the IPionexRestClient and IPionexSocketClient. Configures the services based on the provided configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPionex(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Pionex.Net.Objects.Options.PionexOptions})
member.summary: Add services such as the IPionexRestClient and IPionexSocketClient. Services will be configured based on the provided options.
member.param: Set options for the Pionex services

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_PionexOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
